com.hp.workpath.api.device.events

Class DeviceEventsService

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.device.events.DeviceEventsService

  • public final class DeviceEventsService
extends java.lang.Object

    DeviceEventsService provides interfaces to get detail of device event which occurs on a printer.

    Since:
    API 5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  DeviceEventsService.AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver
      AbstractDeviceEventsChangeObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the DeviceEventsService operations.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static java.util.List<DeviceEvent> getDeviceEvents(android.content.Context context, Result result)
      Retrieve list of events which occurs on a printer.
      static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)
      This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not.

    • Method Detail

      • isSupported

        public static boolean isSupported(android.content.Context context)

        This method is needed to determine if the service is supported or not. If it's not supported, DeviceEventsService operation will be failed.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        Returns:

        boolean Returns result of supported.

        • If service is supported, method returns true.
        • If service is not supported, method returns false.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 5

      • getDeviceEvents

        public static java.util.List<DeviceEvent> getDeviceEvents(android.content.Context context,
                                                          Result result)

        Retrieve list of events which occurs on a printer.

        Parameters:
        context - The Context in which the application is running.
        result - (optional) Indicates any errors occurred while getting events.
        Returns:

        DeviceEvent list.

        • Return value can be empty list, if no device events occurred.
        • Return DeviceEvent list, if device events occurred.

        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - Returns error if calling a method on a null reference(context) or trying to access a field of a null reference will trigger a NullPointerException.
        Since:
        API 5
